question: How many model kits have I worked on or bought?
gold_answer: I have worked on or bought five model kits. The scales of the models are: Revell F-15 Eagle (scale not mentioned), Tamiya 1/48 scale Spitfire Mk.V, 1/16 scale German Tiger I tank, 1/72 scale B-29 bomber, and 1/24 scale '69 Camaro.
reasoning_summary: From memory m_c095ce14fa4c9473f960 (source 6), user acquired a 1/72 B-29 bomber model kit and a 1/24 '69 Camaro model kit at a model show last weekend (2023-05-13). From memory m_c80c9c2e2ce958fd1d13 (source 164), user finished building a Revell F-15 Eagle kit picked up in late April 2023. These are three distinct model kits worked on or bought. No other model kits are mentioned. Count = 3.
